evals.prompt: I want to create a new React project with TypeScript for my portfolio website. Can you set it up with proper linting and formatting?
evals.expected_output: ESLint config, Prettier config, tsconfig.json with strict settings, package.json with scripts, installed dependencies

evals.prompt: Starting a greenfield React + TypeScript app for work. Need strict linting setup with prettier. Just created the vite project.

npm create vite@latest my-app -- --template react-ts

Can you set up the linting and formatting configs for this?
Setting up a fresh React TypeScript project. I ran npx create-react-app with the typescript template. Now I need eslint and prettier configured properly.
evals.expected_output: ESLint config, Prettier config, tsconfig.json with strict settings, package.json with scripts, installed dependencies

evals.prompt: Scaffold a new React project for me with TypeScript and strict ESLint + Prettier configuration
